title: Districts SSOT
desc: Create src/world/districts.js with 6 SG districts (Marina Bay CBD / Civic / Chinatown / Orchard / HDB Heartland / Park Belt). Each district: bbox lat/lng, palette hex array, building typology enum, density, key landmark heights, signature tree species. Export DISTRICTS array + districtAt(lat,lng) + districtAtWorld(x,z) helpers using point-in-polygon ray cast with bbox prefilter. No code outside this file is touched.
verify: Console: districtAtWorld(0,0) returns valid id; no errors on page load.
commit: C1 — Districts SSOT (6 SG zones with palette+typology+landmark data)

title: Asset acquisition
desc: curl-download Quaternius Ultimate Stylized Nature pack (extract palm GLBs to assets/glb/nature/) and Kenney City Kit Roads (lamp post + traffic light + bench GLBs to assets/glb/streetfurniture/). Update assets/CREDITS.md.
verify: ls shows new GLBs; CREDITS.md updated.
commit: C1.assets — download Quaternius palms + Kenney street furniture (CC0)

title: RoadEmitter abstraction
desc: Create src/world/road-emitter.js with two helpers: emitParallelStrip(way,offsetMeters,widthMeters,project) returning {positions,uvs,indices,normals}, and walkAtSpacing(way,intervalMeters,project,callback(pos,perpVec,tangentVec)). Refactor roads-osm.js buildStripGeometry to use emitParallelStrip. Pure refactor — visual identical.
verify: Visual identical to before. No console errors.
commit: C2.refactor — RoadEmitter SSOT (parallel strip + arc-length walker)

title: Sidewalks + curbs
desc: Add 3m-wide concrete sidewalks parallel to primary/secondary/tertiary roads via emitParallelStrip(offset=halfW+1.5,width=3) both sides. Download Polyhaven concrete_floor_02 1k to assets/textures/sidewalk/. Add 0.15m extruded curb strip between road and sidewalk. receiveShadow on. Tile=4m.
verify: Screenshot: roads flanked by lighter concrete strips with curb edge.
commit: C2.sidewalk — PBR concrete sidewalks + 0.15m curbs along OSM roads

title: Lane markings + zebra
desc: Add yellow edge lines on primary+ via dedicated thin overlay strip (emitParallelStrip width=0.2 offset=±halfW). Detect intersections (OSM nodes referenced by 3+ ways), place zebra crossings as procedurally-shaded plane (fract pattern in fragment shader). Use polygonOffset to avoid Z-fight.
verify: Screenshot: yellow edge lines on motorway/trunk; zebra at sample intersection.
commit: C2.markings — yellow lane edges + zebra crossings at intersections

title: Street lamps
desc: Create src/world/street-furniture.js. Use Kenney lamp GLB (fallback procedural pole+head). Place via walkAtSpacing every 30m on primary+, alternating sides, perpendicular offset = halfW + sidewalkW + 0.5. InstancedMesh shared across all roads. Lamp head emissive ramps with dayNight.phase.
verify: Screenshot: lamp poles visible; emissive glow at night.
commit: C2.lamps — instanced street lamps with night emissive

title: Tree-lined avenues
desc: Replace src/world/palms.js with InstancedMesh of Quaternius palm variants along primary+secondary OSM roads using walkAtSpacing(25m), alternating sides, scale jitter 0.85-1.15, random rotation. District-aware species rule: Park Belt mixed, HDB palm only, CBD sparse, others standard.
verify: Screenshot: continuous tree corridor along main road; varied scale/rotation.
commit: C6.trees — instanced 3D palm avenues along OSM roads

title: District-aware buildings
desc: Refactor src/world/buildings.js to read DISTRICTS from districts.js. For each district generate buildings of its typology via switch dispatch: shophouse/tower/colonial/mall/hdb/park-empty. Density per district config. Spawn positions filtered by point-in-polygon. Keep InstancedMesh batches.
verify: Screenshot: visible variety across map; <60 drawcalls.

title: Shophouse builder
desc: Implement procedural shophouse inside buildings.js dispatch. 3 stories, 5-6m frontage, 12m depth, pitched terracotta roof box, pastel Chinatown palette (#E8B4A0/#F4D9A8/#6B8E5A/#C73E3E/#F5E6C8 random). Place in continuous rows along Chinatown secondary roads using walkAtSpacing(6m). Ground floor 1m recessed (5-foot-way hint).
verify: Screenshot: drive into Chinatown bbox → continuous pastel rowhouse strip.

title: CBD glass towers
desc: Implement procedural tower generator. Each: 20-50m square footprint, 80-280m tall, MeshPhysicalMaterial with low roughness 0.1, blue-tinted, transmission 0.3, envMapIntensity 2.0. Emissive window-grid texture mapped to body, intensity ramps with dayNight.phase. 8-12 towers in Marina Bay CBD bbox, heights varied (UOB 280m / MBFC 245m / Guoco 290m / OUB 280m).
verify: Screenshot: distinct CBD skyline; glass reflects HDRI; windows glow at night.
commit: C3.towers — Marina Bay CBD glass towers
